rule.interpretation: When Fucko previously says Dink@Doss, interpret the operational recipient as Swanson in the Doss context.

do_not: Do not treat Dink@Doss as a literal inbox.
Do not ask Ben why Dink@Doss cannot receive work.
Do not invent Speaker or Shared Reality as destination.
Do not call assignment labels delivery proof.
reachable_surface_if_known: Current Swanson Codex session on Doss
unresolved_ambiguity: No separate literal Dink@Doss inbox path is known or claimed.
This alias lock normalizes routing labels only; it does not prove downstream work delivery.
